MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-07-2014 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF MARIANA PHOTIOU'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
